name: LetMeUse
description: Auth-as-a-Service platform - manage apps, users, and subscriptions

endpoints.name: list_apps
endpoints.description: List all registered apps with id, name, secret, domains, webhookUrl

endpoints.name: create_app
endpoints.description:
Register a new app for authentication. Returns { id, secret, domains, webhookUrl }.

SDK: <script src="https://letmeuse.isnowfriend.com/letmeuse.js" data-app-id="APP_ID" data-theme="light|dark|auto" data-accent="#hex" data-locale="en|zh" data-mode="modal|redirect">

window.letmeuse PROPERTIES (not methods!): ready (bool), user ({id,email,displayName,avatar,role}|null)
METHODS: login(), register(), logout(), getToken()=>string|null, onAuthChange(cb)=>unsubscribe, openProfile(), renderAvatar(target)=>cleanup, renderProfileCard(target)=>cleanup

JWT payload: {sub,email,name,role,permissions,app,iat,exp} — decode base64url only, no signature verify needed (internal trust). 24h expiry.
Webhook events (POST to webhookUrl, signed with X-LetMeUse-Signature HMAC-SHA256 using app secret): user.registered, user.login, user.updated, user.deleted, user.disabled, user.enabled, user.email_verified, user.password_reset

endpoints.name: get_app
endpoints.description: Get app details including secret, domains, webhookUrl, oauthProviders config

endpoints.name: update_app
endpoints.description: Update an app configuration (name, domains, webhookUrl, oauthProviders, requireEmailVerification, purchaseVerify). Use purchaseVerify to configure external purchase verification (e.g. classroo.tw).

purchaseVerify.description: Purchase verification config: { enabled, providerUrl, providerSecret, purchasePageUrl, courseId? }

endpoints.name: list_users
endpoints.description: List users with filters (appId, search, pagination)

endpoints.name: get_user
endpoints.description: Get user details: id, email, displayName, role, disabled, emailVerified, avatar, lastLoginAt
